title: Stacked Bar Chart that shows 3 dimensional data
excerpt:
Using stacked bar charts, I need to display the status by people and Due Date, including showing the trend that has occurred for the past three “due dates”.

posts.author: jalley (Julie)
posts.cookedHtml:
Using stacked bar charts, I need to display the status by people and Due Date, including showing the trend that has occurred for the past three “due dates”.

We have a checklist that we are monitoring completed and uncompleted items and need to show that by person over a period of time.

If you have a similar need, please vote on the feature request!

posts.author: DavidSchenkler (David Schenkler | monday ambassador cohort 7)
posts.cookedHtml:
I already have a similar feature request here.

Multi-stack in charts Feature requests
Would love to see the ability to stack by multiple columns in charts.

posts.author: jalley (Julie)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi David,

Thanks.

I wasnt sure from your description if you needed the depth of detail we are needing.

I voted for yours. my request includes requesting additional details we need

posts.author: DavidSchenkler (David Schenkler | monday ambassador cohort 7)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Julie,
I totally get it. I also agree with you, as there are many other things I’d like to see in charting as well. I’ll vote for yours as well.
